sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Real-time Movement
special_mechanics.description: Ultima VI incorporated real-time elements into movement and combat, representing a shift from turn-based to action-oriented gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Isometric Overhead View
special_mechanics.description: Dungeons and caverns use overhead oblique isometric view rather than first-person perspective, affecting movement perception and mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay and design overview but no quantitative physics parameters. SNES port released 1993 (original MS-DOS 1990). No movement speed, acceleration, gravity, or jump mechanics are documented in available source material.
sources_used: wikipedia: Ultima VI: The False Prophet
